title: agent-mcp contract (C1) — cks.* tool surface
description: Single source of truth for the agent-facing MCP tool surface (00 §3 C1). cks owns the cks.* tools enumerated below; jira.* (6 tools) and chainbench.* are owned by their own repos' conformance tests and are intentionally NOT listed here. cks's internal/mcp/schema_golden_test.go asserts that the cks.* tools it actually registers == exactly the names below (no drift, no extras). NOTE: this is a vendored fixture; per the 03-plan CORRECTION, coding-agent (05) is the sole author of the canonical coding-agent/contract/agent-mcp.schema.json — when that lands, replace this copy and add a CI diff-check.

cks.context.get_for_task.description: Compose a budgeted evidence pack for a development task (the primary planning entrypoint): runs the intent → stage1 (semantic) → stage2 (keyword/graph) → stage3 → budget → sanitize pipeline.

cks.context.semantic_search.description: Vector (meaning) search over the indexed corpus. Hits carry source=ckv.

cks.context.search_text.description: BM25 keyword (exactness) search over the indexed corpus. Hits carry source=ckg.

cks.context.find_symbol.description: Resolve a symbol name to its definition citation(s).

cks.context.find_callers.description: List the callers of a symbol (reverse call edges).

cks.context.find_callees.description: List the callees of a symbol (forward call edges).

cks.context.get_subgraph.description: Return all nodes/edges within depth hops of a symbol, all edge types.

cks.context.impact_analysis.description: Reverse-dependency closure of a symbol, grouped by coupling category (callers/interface/type_users/distributed/concurrent/other).

cks.context.concurrency_impact.description: Concurrency blast radius of a symbol: goroutines/channels/locks it spawns/sends-to/acquires and modules reached over concurrency edges, both directions.

cks.context.change_history.description: PR refs (provenance) and/or BM25-ranked hunk evidence for a symbol or intent.

cks.context.get_flow.description: Return a whole flow as a step sequence in call order. Select by one of flow_id, entry_point, or invariant_id.

cks.context.expand_flow.description: Return steps adjacent to a step. direction up=callers, down=callees; bounded by hops and limit.

cks.context.find_branches.description: Map a free-text symptom to ranked when->then@at failure-condition candidates.

cks.context.get_invariant_enforcement.description: Enumerate every site that enforces an invariant (H-guardrail enabler).

cks.ops.health.description: Backend reachability + version pins. Reports degraded when ckv (embedder) is unavailable.

cks.ops.freshness.description: Index-vs-HEAD staleness: indexed head, current head, changed files.

cks.ops.index.description: Refresh the ckv + ckg indexes (maintenance op; shells out to the indexer CLIs). mode=incremental|full.
